novel_features.name: Connection Risk Scoring
novel_features.description: Score every layover in a trip as OK, TIGHT, or HIGH with a per-connection recommended action — in one command, without parsing the full flights table.
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating arrival time, connection window, domestic/international status, and MCT thresholds per airport — data only available once the full itinerary is fetched and parsed. No other Delta tool returns a structured risk report.
novel_features.example: delta-trip-pp-cli trip layover ABC123 JANE SMITH --json
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to check whether a traveler will make their connection or needs to recommend rebooking — returns overallRisk: HIGH/TIGHT/OK without parsing the full flight table.

novel_features_built.name: Connection Risk Scoring
novel_features_built.description: Score every layover in a trip as OK, TIGHT, or HIGH with a per-connection recommended action — in one command, without parsing the full flights table.
novel_features_built.rationale: Requires correlating arrival time, connection window, domestic/international status, and MCT thresholds per airport — data only available once the full itinerary is fetched and parsed. No other Delta tool returns a structured risk report.
novel_features_built.example: delta-trip-pp-cli trip layover ABC123 JANE SMITH --json
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use when an agent needs to check whether a traveler will make their connection or needs to recommend rebooking — returns overallRisk: HIGH/TIGHT/OK without parsing the full flight table.

narrative.headline: Look up any Delta trip by confirmation number — flights, seats, baggage, and connection risk — without logging in.
narrative.value_prop: delta-trip-pp-cli fetches your full Delta itinerary from delta.com using only a confirmation number and name. It surfaces per-passenger seat assignments, fare class, connection risk ratings, baggage allowance, and check-in windows — all without requiring a SkyMiles login or API key.

quickstart.comment: Look up a trip by confirmation number

quickstart.command: delta-trip-pp-cli trip layover ABC123 JANE SMITH --json
quickstart.comment: Check connection risk for every layover

quickstart.command: delta-trip-pp-cli trip checkin ABC123 JANE SMITH
quickstart.comment: See when check-in opens for each flight
View seat assignments and upgrade options

troubleshoots.symptom: Browser window opens but trip lookup times out
troubleshoots.fix: Ensure Chrome is installed and not blocked by corporate proxy. Try --timeout 90s.
Verify the confirmation number format (6 characters, no dashes) and that first/last names match the ticket exactly.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent needs trip details for a Delta Air Lines booking — flight times, seat assignments, connection risk, or check-in status. Does not require a Delta account or API key. Best for read-only travel lookup tasks.

recipes.title: Connection risk check
recipes.command: delta-trip-pp-cli trip layover ABC123 JANE SMITH --json --select overallRisk,connections
recipes.explanation: Returns structured risk data; overallRisk is HIGH/TIGHT/OK for quick agent decisions.

recipes.title: Full itinerary JSON
recipes.command: delta-trip-pp-cli trip show ABC123 JANE SMITH --json --select confirmationNumber,flights
recipes.explanation: Returns structured flights array with departure/arrival times and passenger seats.

recipes.title: Check-in window
recipes.command: delta-trip-pp-cli trip checkin ABC123 JANE SMITH --agent
recipes.explanation: Shows check-in open/closed status with opens-at timestamp for each flight.
